underlying_goal: Validate sticky entity cross-section matching behavior with unit tests, then fix the rule engine test suite after a problematic upstream rebase introduced hash/REST failures
friction_detail: Claude's first git add silently failed leaving edits unsaved, and the verify_rule_engine.py double-newline fix didn't fully resolve the REST hash error which turned out to be an upstream regression.
brief_summary: User wanted sticky-entity cross-section tests added and a broken rule-engine test suite fixed post-rebase; Claude added the tests, diagnosed the hash issue as an upstream regression, and reconfigured the suite to skip REST/default to ASP, achieving 7 PASS 0 FAIL.
